name: Risotto Ai Fughi
method: In a large frying pan on medium heat, add butter and olive oil. Add chopped shallots, then add one cup of rice, and 2 cups of cremini mushrooms. Sauté for a few minutes or until the shallots are transparent. Add white wine and reduce liquid. Add ½ cup of vegetable broth and stir well. Keep gradually adding the remainder of the broth slowly as it absorbs. Let simmer until the risotto is al dente. Near the end, add 1 clove of minced garlic and parsley and stir well. Top with fresh grated parmesan. Garnish with parsley. Serving suggestion: fresh bread and salad. Serves 2-3. Olé
